$comment: Machine-readable project registry for the qalarc.com projects page. A future site renders this. Add new projects to the array.

projects.name: Claude Pulse
projects.tagline: Open-source Claude API usage monitor with an accelerometer-style live gauge
projects.summary: A local-first desktop app that visualizes Anthropic Claude API usage in real time: an accelerometer gauge for tokens-per-minute, a per-minute timeline with peak and rate-limit (429) markers, and a daily calendar. Works with any Claude tool (Claude Code, qalcode2, scripts) by capturing usage at the network layer via a tiny local proxy that logs metadata only — never prompts, never credentials. Helps users discover their undocumented per-minute rate limit by observing their own traffic.
highlights: Accelerometer-style live gauge (TPM needle, green/amber/red zones, peak marker)
Per-minute timeline with peak + rate-limit markers
Calendar of daily usage / peaks / throttles
Always-on-top compact widget mode for a second monitor
Captures ALL Claude tools, not just one app
Local-first: no cloud, no account, no credential handling
Reverse-engineered Anthropic's undocumented OAuth rate-limit headers (documented in-repo)
projects.privacy: Metadata only (token counts, rate-limit headers, status, timing). Never logs prompt/completion text or auth tokens. Credentials never leave the user's machine.

projects.name: Claude Rate-Limit Monitor (research)
projects.tagline: Documentation + method for by-minute Claude rate-limit monitoring
projects.summary: The research and method notes behind Claude Pulse: the three limit layers (per-minute / 5h / 7d), the undocumented OAuth header set, and the observe-don't-brute-force methodology. Superseded as a product by claude-pulse; retained as reference.
